executives.name: Brandon Macdonald
executives.background: Mr. Macdonald is a professional geologist and the CEO of Fireweed Metals Corp. He has extensive experience in capital markets and mineral exploration.

executives.name: Kevin Bullock
executives.background: Mr. Bullock is a registered Professional Mining Engineer and CEO of Signal Gold Inc.

executives.name: Morgan Lekstrom
executives.background: Mr. Lekstrom has 17 years of experience in the mining industry, including executive roles at Silver Hammer Mining Corp. and Kuya Silver Corp. He has a background in project management and operations, having worked with Freeport McMoran and Rio Tinto.
